titleStmt.title: SII 29.68: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 68. (A.R. No. 86 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar (No. 7) dugout from the main street in the village.

States that when Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla was ruling the empire from Jayantipura and his son prince Somēśvara, who is eulogized with a string of birudas, ruled over several territories including Koḷḷipāke-7000, sandhivigrahi, daṇḍanāyaka Kāḷimayya made the grant of three pieces of land of the extent of 3 mattar each to (i) god Mallikārjunadēva installed by his younger brother Tikkapayya, the daṇḍanāyaka of Koḷḷipāke-nāḍu, (ii) god Brahmēśvaradēva of the same place installed by his son-in-law Pratikaṁta Bammadēva-nāyaka and (iii) Svayampāki Mallu-bhaṭṭōpādhyāya, with the permission of the king.
A gift of one mattar of land to god Prabhudēva is mentioned in the post script. This gift is out of six mattar (of land) which point is not clear.

The record is dated in the Chālukya Vikrama year 35, Khara, Pushya śu. 11, Thursday, uttarāyaṇa sankrānti. It corresponds to 1111 A.D., December 12, [Tuesday]. [If the tithi was ba. 11 then it corresponds to December 28, Thursday. But there was no sankrānti on both the days].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī mahādaṁṣṭrāgra doḷaLettergra is written above the line.
bhirāmatēyaṁ
taḷedu bhṛṁgikēdagegeḷa
sirddamāḷkevō vīra
negaḷduddāmaṁ rakṣi
suge nimmanādiva
rāhaṁ . svasti sama
sta bhuvanāśraya
śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramē
śvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ
satyāśraya kuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā bha
raṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvana
malladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarā
vṛddhi pravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkka tāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire jayaṁ
tipurada nelevīḍino
ḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
mire tatkumāraṁ
svasti samastanripajana
stutya satyavākya
koṁguḷivarmma dharmma
mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvaraṁ koḷāḷapu

ravarēśvaraṁ naṁdagi
rināthaṁ rājamāṁ
dhātaṁ madagajēṁdra
lāṁchanaṁ mayū
ra piṁchadhvaja virā
jamāna padmāvatī
tīlabdha varapra
sādaṁ mṛgava
dāmōdaṁ jaya
dhuttaraṁgaṁ nanniya
gaṁgaṁ vibudha ci
ntāmaṇi maṁḍaḷi
makuṭa cūḍā
maṇi dairyya ma
hāvarāhaṁ vīra
śrī kōḷigēhaṁ ripu
rāya madanivā
raṇaṁ bappana gaṁdha
vāraṇaṁ nāmā
di samasta prasasti sa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
cāḷukya gaṁgapermmā
ḍi kumāraṁ sō
mēśvaradēvaru ko
ḷḷipāke Ercchāsira
mādiyāgi pa
lavu dēśaṁgaḷanā

ḷuttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi
samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrī ma
daṁtaḥpura verggaḍe saṁdhivigra
hi daṁḍanāyakaṁ kāḷimayya
ṁgaḷe . cāḷukya vikrama
varṣada 35 neya khara
saṁvatsarada puṣya suddha
11 bṛhaspati vāradaṁ
duttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti pa
rvva nimittamāgi śrīma
darasaṁge binnapaṁge
ydu dhārāpūrvva
ka māḍi paḍedu ta
nna tammaṁ koḷḷipāke
nāḍa daṁḍanāyaka
tikkapayya māḍisi
da mallikārjjuna dē
vargge hoḷala baḷiya
rāmalakeṟiyalli
jagaddēva nārāya
ṇadēvara mānyadiṁ pa
ḍuvaṇa gardde mattaru
3 Alliya tammaḷiyaṁ

pratikaṁṭa bamma
dēva nāyaka(nu)
māḍisida brahmē
śvaradēvargge gardde ma
ttaru 3 svayaṁ
pāki mallibhaṭṭō
pādhyaya
rgge kalyabīḍu
nālvatteṟa baḷi
ya nellūṭina
hiṟiya keṟe
ya tegedu kā
luveya moda
lgāda gardde matta
ru 3 . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vā
yō harēti
vasundharā ṣaṣṭhi
rvvarṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ .
Āṟu mattaroḷage
prabhu dēvargge vonda matta
ru .
Digital edition of SII 29.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
